meta.title: Mika Shop bot documentation bundle
meta.description: Structured index derived from markdown files in bot/docs. Edit the .md sources of truth; regenerate or merge manually when docs change.

environment.SYNC_GUILD_ID: Optional — immediate guild-scoped slash sync for development

documents.title: Bot documentation index
documents.summary: Table of contents linking all feature docs; points to project README for operator setup.

documents.title: Overview and core runtime
documents.summary: Intents, setup_hook, slash sync (including SYNC_GUILD_ID), on_ready hooks, interaction logging, tree error handling, embed color palette.

documents.title: Config
documents.summary: Guild configuration: /config view (paged), /config reset groups, /config payment strings for GCash/PayPal/Ko-fi/QR URLs.

documents.title: Setup wizard
documents.summary: Interactive /setup hub: tickets/panels, queue, shop&TOS, payment channel, roles&channels, pricing pointers; /setup_resume.

documents.title: Quotes and pricing
documents.summary: Quote calculator wizard, recalculate in ticket, pricelist, setprice, quoteextras, setdiscount, setcurrency; quote_compute fees and thresholds.

documents.title: Tickets and panels
documents.summary: Ticket panel embed, ticketbutton/ticketform, deploy tos/payment, user flow (TOS, age gate, shop open), payment confirm, stage, revision, references, close/transcript.

documents.title: Queue, templates, and loyalty
documents.summary: Order registration, queue embeds, OrderStatusView, message template overrides, loyalty milestones, order ID prefix.

documents.title: Shop status and TOS
documents.summary: /shop open|close, /shopstatus, TOS agree button, deploy tos; gates ticket creation with shop DB state.

documents.title: Payment panel
documents.summary: /deploy payment posts Mode of Payment embed with GCash/PayPal/Ko-fi buttons; PaymentView ephemerals.

documents.title: Vouches
documents.summary: Vouches channel auto-log, manual /vouch, /vouches pager; PlsVouch role removal.

documents.title: Warnings
documents.summary: Reason autocomplete and /warnreason presets; private audit embed to WARN_LOG_CHANNEL; DM appeal button and warn-appeal ticket; clearwarn from appeal channel.

documents.title: Stickies
documents.summary: Sticky embed repost after user messages; CRUD commands and cache refresh.

documents.title: Drops
documents.summary: Staff /drop DMs delivery link; drophistory; optional completion DM from queue completion.

documents.title: Owner tools
documents.summary: Guild owner-only /purge_bot_dms to delete bot-authored messages in a user's DM channel.

documents.title: Database reference
documents.summary: SQLite tables: tickets, orders, guild settings, quote tables, panels, stickies, etc.

sqlTables.name: tickets
sqlTables.purpose: Per-channel ticket records, quotes, status, revisions, references

sqlTables.name: orders
sqlTables.purpose: Queue orders linked to ticket channels

sqlTables.name: persist_panels
sqlTables.purpose: TOS, shop status, payment panel message locations

sqlTables.name: ticket_panel
sqlTables.purpose: Ticket panel embed location and copy

checks.can_manage_server_config: Administrator OR Manage Server OR staff role (utils/checks.py)
